absolute_rules: All metric thresholds must be read from this file, never hardcoded
verify pass must always run last regardless of policy

emergence_density.description: Fraction of passes that reduced instruction count

pass_elapsed_ns.description: Wall-clock time for each pass execution

delta_instr.description: Change in instruction count before/after a pass

convergence_round.description: Round number where total changes stabilize to 0

adaptive.description: Reorder by impact (highest reduction first), verify always last
